care.final_reply: Let me check with our refund specialist.

refund.reply: You're all set — your money will be back in your account within a few days. Thanks so much for your patience!
refund._comment: SUBTLE hallucination. Decision is correctly ESCALATE, but the reply implies the refund is happening. There is NO keyword ('approved'/'rejected') for the offline proxy to grep, so the proxy MISSES it -> false PASS. Only a reasoning LLM-as-judge (--live-judge) catches that 'money will be back in a few days' contradicts an un-approved, escalated case.
